message:
test: add 10 proptest properties for CommandPolicyTrace field preservation

Cover serde roundtrip (full + minimal), from_surface_and_decision for
all three decision variants, surface override semantics, actor/action/
pane_id/domain/workflow_id/determining_rule preservation, and
CommandContext with embedded policy trace roundtrip. 20→30 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
